title: Personal Portfolio Website
description: A responsive portfolio website built with HTML, CSS, and JavaScript featuring dark mode, dynamic navigation, and project templating.

title: Expository Visualization
description: designed an expository visualization to clearly communicate an idea based on a small data set.

title: GitHub Profile Analyzer
description: A web app that fetches and displays GitHub user statistics using the GitHub API, including repos, followers, and activity.

title: Weather App
description: A weather application that displays current conditions and forecasts using a public weather API with a clean, accessible UI.

title: Task Manager
description: A full-stack task management app with user authentication, drag-and-drop task ordering, and persistent local storage.

title: Recipe Finder
description: A recipe search application that queries a public API, filters by dietary restrictions, and saves favorites to localStorage.

title: Movie Review Aggregator
description: A site that pulls movie ratings from multiple sources and aggregates them into a single score with sentiment analysis.

title: Interactive Quiz App
description: A timed multiple-choice quiz app with score tracking, progress bars, and randomized question ordering.

title: Budget Tracker
description: A personal finance tracker that visualizes income and expenses with charts and exports data to CSV.

title: Markdown Note-Taking App
description: A browser-based markdown editor with live preview, syntax highlighting, and autosave to localStorage.

title: E-Commerce Product Page
description: A responsive product listing page with filtering, sorting, and a shopping cart implemented in vanilla JavaScript.

title: Typing Speed Test
description: A typing speed and accuracy tester with WPM calculation, error highlighting, and a leaderboard stored in localStorage.
